reason: Codex runtime returned a usage-limit error (no credits until 2026-06-20); the write-enabled review could not run. Fell back to a manual re-derivation of every load-bearing equation against the primary source (SVT.tex / arXiv:0810.3286): prox-of-nuclear-norm theorem and subgradient set, strong-convexity lemma, convergence inequality r_k^2 <= r_{k-1}^2 - (2*delta - delta^2)||X^k - X^*||_F^2 requiring delta<2, delta=1.2/p, tau=5n (2*tau/n=10), k0 warm start, tau->infinity limit, and the relative-residual KKT stop. All verified consistent.
